flags.name: quiet
flags.description: Emit bare values when exactly one field or column remains

flags.name: fields
flags.description: Project JSON envelope data fields using dot/bracket paths like number or positions[].name

flags.name: columns
flags.description: Select human table columns using dot/bracket paths like number or positions[].name

flags.name: raw
flags.description: Emit the upstream JSON response body directly when supported

flags.name: dry-run
flags.description: Accepted on read-only commands and reserved for future mutating request previews

flags.name: max-retries
flags.description: Maximum retry attempts for idempotent reads on network or 5xx failures

flags.name: input
flags.description: Invoice JSON input as inline JSON, @file, or - for stdin

flags.name: identify-oss
flags.description: Validate OSS eligibility before marking the invoice as OSS

flags.name: fill-default-descriptions
flags.description: Include default account descriptions on the created invoice

flags.name: correction-positions
flags.description: Pass a correction positions companion option such as full

env_vars.name: FAKTUROWNIA_PROFILE
env_vars.description: Select a profile unless --profile is provided

env_vars.name: FAKTUROWNIA_URL
env_vars.description: Override the base account URL from any profile

env_vars.name: FAKTUROWNIA_API_TOKEN
env_vars.description: Override the API token from any profile

exit_codes.description: reserved for throttling or retry budget exhaustion

notes: the CLI accepts the inner invoice object, then wraps it in the upstream {"invoice": ...} envelope
companion CLI flags `--identify-oss`, `--fill-default-descriptions`, and `--correction-positions` are applied outside the inner invoice object
known_fields is curated from the upstream README and is not exhaustive
